description: Default profile for FR-SR-02 mouse-only acceptance and FR-IN-03. Uses wheel navigation, primary buttons for flags, X1/X2 for archive pipeline steps with double-confirm (FR-IN-05). Slideshow: right-button + wheel for sibling browse in fullscreen; wheel tilt left or X3 to switch to browse mode at current slide when hardware exposes them.

sort.flagDelete.notes: Short click in viewer flags delete; long-press opens context menu (see design doc).

sort.deleteArchiveWizard.notes: Opens delete/archive wizard (scoped to current image parent folder).

sort.clearAllFlags.notes: Triple middle within ~600ms when wheel tilt is unavailable.

slideshow.switchToBrowseAtCurrentLocatio.notes: When OS exposes a sixth discrete button; otherwise use keyboard Tab in slideshow.

view.panPreview.notes: Drag on primary preview to pan when image exceeds the pane (scrollbars also available).

ui.fullscreen.notes: Double-click on viewer chrome / title-safe region; implementation defines hit target.

ui.escape.notes: Primary buttons pressed together within ~50ms; ignored during drag gestures.
